## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm build` pass
- [ ] Docs/README updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) for any user-facing change
